questionHtml:
The graph shows the first ionization energies of some consecutive elements.

Which statement is correct?

A.     Y is in group 3

B.     Y is in group 10

C.     X is in group 5

D.     X is in group 18

meta.title: The graph shows the first ionization energies of some consecutive elements. Which statement is correct? A. Y is in group 3 B. Y is in group 10 C. X is in group 5 D. X is in group 1
